response: 1. Project Goals: Drop-in bash replacement - focus on being a seamless PowerShell replacement for agentsh with identical capabilities and security model. 2. Pain Points: N/A - new project. 3. Team Structure: Solo developer (Tal Muskal). 4. Workflow Preferences: Trunk-based development, continuous releases, PRs optional. 5. CI/CD Needs: Cross-platform CI on Windows, Linux, macOS. 6. External Integrations: None specified. 7. Conventions: PowerShell best practices (PascalCase cmdlets, approved verbs), Strict TypeScript for tooling/wrappers, Pester tests required for all PowerShell modules, Cross-platform CI required. 8. Babysitter Preferences: Autonomous - run with minimal interruptions, only pause for truly destructive operations.
